brand.name: JN Corporations
brand.tagline: Building calm, capable digital ecosystems for modern teams.
brand.description: JN Corporations is a premium corporate ecosystem platform focused on practical tools, startup enablement, and elegant operational experiences.

hero.title: A polished command center for people, products, and progress.
hero.body: JN Corporations brings internal tools, startup ideas, developer craft, and business clarity into one offline-ready web platform.

principles.title: Mission
principles.body: Create simple, reliable digital systems that help teams launch, learn, and operate with confidence.

principles.title: Vision
principles.body: Become a trusted ecosystem layer where business tools feel premium, fast, and human from the first tap.

principles.title: Ecosystem
principles.body: A growing collection of products, dashboards, utilities, and knowledge hubs connected by a shared design language.

timeline.title: Foundation
timeline.body: Defined the JN Corporations identity around clean business experiences and lightweight web systems.

timeline.title: Ecosystem Thinking
timeline.body: Shifted from single tools to a scalable platform model where apps can be added through structured data.

timeline.title: Offline-First Platform
timeline.body: Introduced a static PWA architecture for fast access across Android, desktop, and iOS.
